name: вӣ“пёҸSkyler Connery
description:
!MLM/BL!

(Fellowbully!user)

Skyler can tell by the look on your face that he really fucked up this time.

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹ рқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпј¬пҪҸпҪ–пҪ…пҪ’пҪ“гҖ‘

Original bot: Est. Relationship: Boyfriends - Skyler patches you up after you get into a fight

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Skyler reads a fanfic of you and him and has his gay awakening

рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ Pride Month рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ

Played a VN and one of the characters kind of reminded me of this guy and it was angsty so I wanted angst. For old followers: HES BACK!! For new followers: Meet the guy who essentially jumpstarted my account. I know I said the last bot was probably gonna be the last pride bot but SURPRISE!! Hope its a good one. I love this man. Also user IS supposed to be a fellow bully, for those of you who like to be good it isnt specified in the personality.

1400+ followers now?? Sorry if these thank you messages are getting repetitive, but thanks so much. Ill try to keep this one short, but as always I truly appreciate each and every one of you, old or new, for chatting with my boys. The amount of serotonin I get when I see a sweet/silly review or that chat number go up is alot. I love you all and thanks for all your support and sweet compliments <33

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

вҡ пёҸWARNING: Mentions of abuse in intro and background (specifically controlled drowning in the intro). Possible violence towards others (bro is a bully)вҡ пёҸ

!!Used vynnaepвҖҷs formatting for the personality and kolach3вҖҷs prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: I wasn't able to find the artist, but if you know who it is, please let me know (pretty sure it is ai generated). :))
